name: Empty State
goal: Standardised centred-panel for empty regions, completion outcomes, and error states — icon, title, body, actions, and optional collapsible details. Covers empty-inbox, no-results, onboarding, success, error, info, and warning surfaces.
description: Centred column layout. Renders an optional circular icon badge (or a caller-supplied illustration), a title slot (caller controls heading level), a body description slot, an actions slot for CTA buttons, and an optional collapsible details slot for technical detail (e.g., error codes). Three size variants (sm/md/lg) scale spacing. The severity attribute (none/success/error/info/warning) adds a tinted panel and auto-derived icon glyph — covering the former ce-result use cases. Host carries role=status for live-region accessibility.

props.name: icon
props.description: Short text or emoji rendered in a circular icon badge. Ignored when the illustration slot is filled.

props.name: size
props.description: Size variant — sm (compact) | md (default) | lg (larger padding and illustration area).

props.name: severity
props.description: Severity tint — none (default, empty-state look) | success | error | info | warning. When set to anything other than 'none', adds a tinted background, colors the icon and title, and auto-derives a default icon glyph if `icon` is unset. Absorbs former ce-result use cases.

slots.name: illustration
slots.description: Custom illustration or graphic (SVG, img, ce-icon with slotted SVG). When filled, suppresses the icon badge.

slots.name: title
slots.description: Heading content. Caller is responsible for providing the correct heading element (h2, h3, etc.) — the component does not impose a heading level.
Description body text shown below the title.

slots.name: actions
slots.description: Call-to-action area. Accepts ce-button, ce-link, or any interactive element.

slots.name: details
slots.description: Optional collapsible technical detail rendered inside a native <details> below the actions row. Primarily used with severity='error' for error codes / stack traces.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Gap between items in sm size.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-3
cssVariables.description: Default gap between items and sm padding.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-4
cssVariables.description: Default horizontal padding and sm vertical padding.

cssVariables.name: --ce-muted
cssVariables.description: Body text and icon badge foreground color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-xs
cssVariables.description: Body font size in sm variant.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-md
cssVariables.description: Default title font size and lg body font size.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-lg
cssVariables.description: lg title font size and md icon badge font size.

cssVariables.name: --ce-radius
cssVariables.description: Border radius for the tinted severity panel.

sideEffects.description: Sets role='status' on the host element in connectedCallback if not already present.
sideEffects.reason: Allows screen readers to announce the empty state when it appears dynamically (e.g., after a search returns no results).

a11y.notes: Host carries role='status' (set in connectedCallback, not in markup, so pre-rendered HTML keeps whatever role is authored). The title slot should receive a heading element from the caller — the component intentionally does not impose a heading level (e.g., h2 vs h3 depends on page context).
